- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) on a cron schedule or once at a specific time. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
- web-coder: Expert 10x engineer with comprehensive knowledge of web development, internet protocols, and web standards. Use when working with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, web APIs, HTTP/HTTPS, web security, performance optimization, accessibility, or any web/internet concepts. Specializes in translating web terminology accurately and implementing modern web standards across frontend and backend development.

- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

content.thinking:
El usuario está pidiendo que trabaje en un sistema de inventario y tickets. Parece que hay un proyecto existente con:
1. Un sistema de inventario y tickets ya creado
2. Una página de usuario comunitario con sistema de compras (carrito)
3. Sistema de admin dispatch para atender tickets

Necesita:
1. Dar de alta productos ya existentes en la página al inventario
2. Que se comuniquen entre ellos (página de usuario ↔ inventario)
3. Sistema de compras con carrito para el usuario comunitario
4. Seleccionar producto, medida y demás detalles
5. Confirmar compra → ticket llega a admin dispatch
6. En inventario, cada producto tiene ~10 unidades
7. Crear plantillas para manejar el inventario de cada producto
8. Arreglar el botón de "agregar producto" que no funciona
9. Seleccionar tipo de producto con plantillas para definir qué campos se necesitan

Primero necesito ver el estado actual del proyecto para entender qué existe y qué falta.

            background: var(--bg-primary);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            overflow-x: hidden;
            cursor: none;
            transition: background 0.3s ease, color 0.3s ease;
        }

        /* Custom Cursor */
        .cursor {
            position: fixed;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            border: 2px solid var(--primary);
            border-radius: 50%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 10000;
            transition: transform 0.15s ease, width 0.2s ease, height 0.2s ease, border-color 0.3s ease, background 0.3s ease;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            mix-blend-mode: difference;
        }

        .cursor.hover {
            width: 60px;
            height: 60px;
            border-color: var(--secondary);
            background: rgba(124,77,255,0.1);
        }

        .cursor-dot {
            position: fixed;
            width: 6px;
            height: 6px;
            background: var(--primary);
            border-radius: 50%;
            pointer-events: none;
            z-index: 10001;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        }

        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .cursor, .cursor-dot { display: none; }
            body { cursor: auto; }

        ::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }

        .bg-animation {

            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            z-index: 1000;
            transition: all 0.4s ease;
        }

        nav.scrolled {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
            padding: 0.85rem 4%;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 30px var(--shadow);
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color);
        }

        .nav-logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
        }

        .nav-logo-ring {
            width: 42px;
            height: 42px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            position: relative;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        .nav-logo-ring::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: -2px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary), var(--cyan), var(--accent));
            background-size: 300% 300%;
            animation: gradientRotateNav 4s ease infinite;
            z-index: -1;
        }

        .nav-logo-ring::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border-radius: 50%;
            background: var(--bg-card);
            z-index: -2;
        }

        .nav-logo-ring .logo-inner {
            width: calc(100% - 4px);

            display: flex;

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Dashboard - Subli Pop Admin</title>
    <link rel="icon" href="../favicon.svg" type="image/svg+xml">
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
    <style>
        :root {
            --bg-primary: #0a0a0f;
            --bg-secondary: #12121a;
            --bg-tertiary: #1a1a24;
            --bg-card: #1a1a24;
            --text-primary: #ffffff;
            --text-secondary: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
            --text-muted: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
            --primary: #e040fb;
            --secondary: #7c4dff;
            --accent: #ff5252;
            --cyan: #00bcd4;
            --success: #4caf50;
            --warning: #ff9800;
            --border: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
        }

        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

        body {
            font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg-primary);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            min-height: 100vh;
        }

        /* Sidebar */
        .sidebar {
            width: 260px;
            background: var(--bg-secondary);
            height: 100vh;
            position: fixed;
            left: 0;
            top: 0;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
            z-index: 100;
        }

        .sidebar-header {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .sidebar-logo {
            width: 42px;
            height: 42px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            border-radius: 12px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        .sidebar-brand {
            font-weight: 700;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        .sidebar-brand span {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 400;
            color: var(--text-muted);
        }

        .sidebar-nav {
            flex: 1;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }

        .nav-item {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 12px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            border: none;
            background: none;
            width: 100%;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .nav-item:hover, .nav-item.active {
            background: rgba(224,64,251,0.1);
            color: var(--primary);
        }

        .nav-item.active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            color: white;
        }

        .nav-icon {
            width: 22px;
            height: 22px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 1rem;
        }

        .sidebar-footer {
            padding-top: 1rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .theme-toggle {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0.75rem 1rem;
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            border-radius: 12px;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .theme-toggle span {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .toggle-switch {
            width: 44px;
            height: 24px;
            background: var(--primary);
            border-radius: 12px;
            position: relative;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .toggle-switch::after {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            width: 20px;
            height: 20px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            top: 2px;
            left: 22px;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .logout-btn {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 12px;
            color: var(--accent);
            text-decoration: none;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            width: 100%;
            background: rgba(255,82,82,0.1);
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        .logout-btn:hover {
            background: rgba(255,82,82,0.2);
        }

        /* Main Content */
        .main-content {
            margin-left: 260px;
            padding: 2rem;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }

        .page-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        .page-title {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .page-title span {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
        }

        .btn {
            padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            display: inline-flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            border: none;
        }

        .btn-primary {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            color: white;
        }

        .btn-primary:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(224,64,251,0.35);
        }

        .btn-secondary {
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .btn-secondary:hover {
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }

        .btn-danger {
            background: rgba(255,82,82,0.1);
            color: var(--accent);
        }

        .btn-success {
            background: rgba(76,175,80,0.1);
            color: var(--success);
        }

        /* Stats Grid */
        .stats-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        @media (max-width: 1400px) {
            .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
        }

        .stat-card {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .stat-icon {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 14px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 1.3rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .stat-icon.purple { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary)); }
        .stat-icon.cyan { background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cyan), #009688); }
        .stat-icon.green { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4caf50, #8bc34a); }
        .stat-icon.orange { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ff9800, #ff5722); }

        .stat-value {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
        }

        .stat-label {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--text-muted);
        }

        /* Category Tabs */
        .category-tabs {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }

        .category-tab {
            padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem;
            border-radius: 50px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            background: var(--bg-card);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .category-tab:hover {
            border-color: var(--primary);
            color: var(--primary);
        }

        .category-tab.active {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--primary), var(--secondary));
            border-color: transparent;
            color: white;
        }

        /* Products Table */
        .products-section {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        .products-table {
            width: 100%;
            border-collapse: collapse;
        }

        .products-table th,
        .products-table td {
            padding: 1rem;
            text-align: left;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .products-table th {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.5px;
        }

        .products-table tr:hover {
            background: rgba(224,64,251,0.03);
        }

        .product-cell {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.75rem;
        }

        .product-thumb {
            width: 50px;
            height: 50px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            object-fit: cover;
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }

        .product-thumb img {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }

        .product-name {
            font-weight: 500;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .product-category {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            color: var(--text-muted);
        }

        .price-cell {
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .stock-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .stock-high { background: rgba(76,175,80,0.1); color: var(--success); }
        .stock-low { background: rgba(255,152,0,0.1); color: var(--warning); }
        .stock-out { background: rgba(255,82,82,0.1); color: var(--accent); }

        .actions-cell {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }

        .action-btn {
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: none;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .action-btn:hover {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: white;
        }

        /* Modal */
        .modal-overlay {
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
            backdrop-filter: blur(5px);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 1000;
            opacity: 0;
            visibility: hidden;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .modal-overlay.active {
            opacity: 1;
            visibility: visible;
        }

        .modal {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 2rem;
            width: 90%;
            max-width: 700px;
            max-height: 90vh;
            overflow-y: auto;
            transform: scale(0.9);
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .modal-overlay.active .modal {
            transform: scale(1);
        }

        .modal-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .modal-title {
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }

        .modal-close {
            width: 36px;
            height: 36px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            border: none;
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            cursor: pointer;
            font-size: 1.2rem;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: var(--text-primary);
        }

        .form-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 1rem;
        }

        @media (max-width: 600px) {
            .form-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .form-group.full {
            grid-column: span 2;
        }

        @media (max-width: 600px) {
            .form-group.full { grid-column: span 1; }
        }

        .form-label {
            display: block;
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
        }

        .form-input, .form-select, .form-textarea {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 0.85rem 1rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.9rem;
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .form-input:focus, .form-select:focus, .form-textarea:focus {
            outline: none;
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }

        .form-textarea {
            resize: vertical;
            min-height: 80px;
        }

        .image-upload-area {
            border: 2px dashed var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 2rem;
            text-align: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
        }

        .image-upload-area:hover {
            border-color: var(--primary);
        }

        .image-preview {
            width: 100%;
            height: 200px;
            object-fit: cover;
            border-radius: 10px;
            margin-top: 1rem;
            display: none;
        }

        .image-preview.show {
            display: block;
        }

        .modal-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-top: 1.5rem;
        }

        .modal-actions .btn {
            flex: 1;
        }

        /* Tickets Section */
        .tickets-section {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        .ticket-filters {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .ticket-filter {
            padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 8px;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            background: transparent;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .ticket-filter.active, .ticket-filter:hover {
            background: var(--primary);
            border-color: var(--primary);
            color: white;
        }

        .ticket-card {
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 1.25rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .ticket-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: flex-start;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .ticket-id {
            font-weight: 700;
            color: var(--primary);
        }

        .ticket-status {
            padding: 0.35rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 20px;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .ticket-status.pending { background: rgba(255,152,0,0.2); color: var(--warning); }
        .ticket-status.confirmed { background: rgba(0,188,212,0.2); color: var(--cyan); }
        .ticket-status.completed { background: rgba(76,175,80,0.2); color: var(--success); }
        .ticket-status.cancelled { background: rgba(255,82,82,0.2); color: var(--accent); }

        .ticket-products {
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        .ticket-product {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 0.5rem 0;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
            font-size: 0.9rem;
        }

        .ticket-product:last-child {
            border-bottom: none;
        }

        .ticket-total {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            font-weight: 700;
            padding-top: 0.75rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .ticket-actions {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            margin-top: 1rem;
            padding-top: 1rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .ticket-date {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            margin-top: 0.5rem;
        }

        /* Planner */
        .planner-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
            gap: 0.5rem;
            margin-top: 1rem;
        }

        .planner-day {
            background: var(--bg-tertiary);
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 0.5rem;
            min-height: 80px;
        }

        .planner-day-header {
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-muted);
            text-align: center;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        .planner-ticket {
            background: var(--primary);
            color: white;
            font-size: 0.65rem;
            padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem;
            border-radius: 4px;
            margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
            cursor: pointer;
        }

        /* Charts Grid */
        .charts-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
            gap: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }

        @media (max-width: 1000px) {
            .charts-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
        }

        .chart-card {
            background: var(--bg-card);
            border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
        }

        .chart-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }

        .chart-title {
            font-size: 1rem;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .chart-container {
            height: 250px;
            position: relative;
        }

        /* Page sections */
        .page-section {
            display: none;
        }

        .page-section.active {
            display: block;
        }

        /* Responsive */
        @media (max-width: 900px) {
            .sidebar { transform: translateX(-100%); }
            .sidebar.open { transform: translateX(0); }
            .main-content { margin-left: 0; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- Sidebar -->
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
        <div class="sidebar-header">
            <div class="sidebar-logo">SP</div>
            <div class="sidebar-brand">Subli Pop<span>Panel Admin</span></div>
        </div>

        <nav class="sidebar-nav">
            <button class="nav-item active" data-page="dashboard">
                <span class="nav-icon">📊</span> Dashboard
            </button>
            <button class="nav-item" data-page="productos">
                <span class="nav-icon">🎨</span> Productos
            </button>
            <button class="nav-item" data-page="tickets">
                <span class="nav-icon">🎫</span> Tickets
            </button>
            <button class="nav-item" data-page="inventario">
                <span class="nav-icon">📦</span> Inventario
            </button>
        </nav>

        <div class="sidebar-footer">
            <div class="theme-toggle">
                <span>🌙 Modo</span>
                <div class="toggle-switch" id="themeToggle"></div>
            </div>
            <button class="logout-btn" onclick="logout()">
                <span class="nav-icon">🚪</span> Cerrar Sesión
            </button>
        </div>
    </aside>

    <!-- Main Content -->
    <main class="main-content">
        <!-- Dashboard Page -->
        <div id="page-dashboard" class="page-section active">
            <div class="page-header">
                <h1 class="page-title">Dashboard <span>General</span></h1>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showModal('addProduct')">
                    <span>+</span> Nuevo Producto
                </button>
            </div>

            <div class="stats-grid">
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon purple">👁️</div>
                    <div class="stat-value" id="stat-visitas">0</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Visitas Totales</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon cyan">🛒</div>
                    <div class="stat-value" id="stat-pedidos">0</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Pedidos del Mes</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon green">💰</div>
                    <div class="stat-value" id="stat-ingresos">$0</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Ingresos del Mes</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon orange">📦</div>
                    <div class="stat-value" id="stat-stock">0</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Productos en Stock</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="charts-grid">
                <div class="chart-card">
                    <div class="chart-header">
                        <h3 class="chart-title">Ventas Mensuales</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="chart-container">
                        <canvas id="salesChart"></canvas>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="chart-card">
                    <div class="chart-header">
                        <h3 class="chart-title">Productos Populares</h3>
                    </div>
                    <div class="chart-container">
                        <canvas id="productsChart"></canvas>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="tickets-section">
                <div class="page-header">
                    <h3 class="chart-title">Tickets Recientes</h3>
                    <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="showPage('tickets')">Ver Todos</button>
                </div>
                <div id="recentTickets"></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Products Page -->
        <div id="page-productos" class="page-section">
            <div class="page-header">
                <h1 class="page-title">Gestión de <span>Productos</span></h1>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showModal('addProduct')">
                    <span>+</span> Agregar Producto
                </button>
            </div>

            <div class="category-tabs" id="categoryTabs"></div>

            <div class="products-section">
                <table class="products-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Producto</th>
                            <th>Categoría</th>
                            <th>Precio</th>
                            <th>Stock</th>
                            <th>Ventas</th>
                            <th>Acciones</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="productsTableBody"></tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Tickets Page -->
        <div id="page-tickets" class="page-section">
            <div class="page-header">
                <h1 class="page-title">Sistema de <span>Tickets</span></h1>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="showModal('addTicket')">
                    <span>+</span> Nuevo Ticket
                </button>
            </div>

            <div class="ticket-filters">
                <button class="ticket-filter active" data-filter="all">Todos</button>
                <button class="ticket-filter" data-filter="pending">Pendientes</button>
                <button class="ticket-filter" data-filter="confirmed">Confirmados</button>
                <button class="ticket-filter" data-filter="completed">Completados</button>
                <button class="ticket-filter" data-filter="cancelled">Cancelados</button>
            </div>

            <div class="tickets-section" id="ticketsContainer"></div>

            <div class="chart-card" style="margin-top: 2rem;">
                <div class="chart-header">
                    <h3 class="chart-title">Planner de Entregas</h3>
                </div>
                <div class="planner-grid" id="plannerGrid"></div>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Inventario Page -->
        <div id="page-inventario" class="page-section">
            <div class="page-header">
                <h1 class="page-title">Control de <span>Inventario</span></h1>
            </div>

            <div class="stats-grid" style="margin-bottom: 2rem;">
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon purple">📦</div>
                    <div class="stat-value" id="inv-total">0</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Total Productos</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon orange">⚠️</div>
                    <div class="stat-value" id="inv-low">0</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Stock Bajo (<10)</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon green">✅</div>
                    <div class="stat-value" id="inv-ok">0</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Stock Normal</div>
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <div class="stat-icon cyan">🚫</div>
                    <div class="stat-value" id="inv-out">0</div>
                    <div class="stat-label">Agotados</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="products-section">
                <table class="products-table">
                    <thead>
                        <tr>
                            <th>Producto</th>
                            <th>Categoría</th>
                            <th>Stock Actual</th>
                            <th>Estado</th>
                            <th>Acciones</th>
                        </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody id="inventoryTableBody"></tbody>
                </table>
            </div>
        </div>
    </main>

    <!-- Product Modal -->
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="productModal">
        <div class="modal">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h3 class="modal-title" id="productModalTitle">Nuevo Producto</h3>
                <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('productModal')">×</button>
            </div>
            <form id="productForm" onsubmit="saveProduct(event)">
                <input type="hidden" id="productId">
                <div class="form-grid">
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Nombre</label>
                        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="productName" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Categoría</label>
                        <select class="form-select" id="productCategory" required></select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Precio Menudeo ($)</label>
                        <input type="number" class="form-input" id="productPrice" step="0.01" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Precio Mayoreo ($)</label>
                        <input type="number" class="form-input" id="productPriceMay" step="0.01">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Cantidad Min. Mayoreo</label>
                        <input type="number" class="form-input" id="productQtyMay" value="10">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Stock</label>
                        <input type="number" class="form-input" id="productStock" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group full">
                        <label class="form-label">Descripción</label>
                        <textarea class="form-textarea" id="productDescription"></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Material</label>
                        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="productMaterial">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Técnica</label>
                        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="productTechnique">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Capacidad</label>
                        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="productCapacity">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Medidas</label>
                        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="productMeasures">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group full">
                        <label class="form-label">URL de Imagen</label>
                        <input type="url" class="form-input" id="productImage" placeholder="https://..." onchange="previewImage(this)">
                        <div class="image-upload-area" onclick="document.getElementById('imageFileInput').click()">
                            <p style="color: var(--text-muted);">O arrastra una imagen aquí</p>
                            <input type="file" id="imageFileInput" accept="image/*" style="display:none" onchange="handleImageUpload(this)">
                        </div>
                        <img src="" alt="" class="image-preview" id="imagePreview">
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-actions">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('productModal')">Cancelar</button>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Guardar</button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Ticket Modal -->
    <div class="modal-overlay" id="ticketModal">
        <div class="modal">
            <div class="modal-header">
                <h3 class="modal-title" id="ticketModalTitle">Nuevo Ticket</h3>
                <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal('ticketModal')">×</button>
            </div>
            <form id="ticketForm" onsubmit="saveTicket(event)">
                <input type="hidden" id="ticketId">
                <div class="form-grid">
                    <div class="form-group full">
                        <label class="form-label">Cliente</label>
                        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="ticketClient" required>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group full">
                        <label class="form-label">Productos (formato: nombre,cantidad,precio - uno por línea)</label>
                        <textarea class="form-textarea" id="ticketProducts" placeholder="Taza Clásica,2,240" required></textarea>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Fecha Entrega</label>
                        <input type="date" class="form-input" id="ticketDate">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                        <label class="form-label">Estado</label>
                        <select class="form-select" id="ticketStatus">
                            <option value="pending">Pendiente</option>
                            <option value="confirmed">Confirmado</option>
                            <option value="completed">Completado</option>
                            <option value="cancelled">Cancelado</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group full">
                        <label class="form-label">Notas</label>
                        <textarea class="form-textarea" id="ticketNotes"></textarea>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-actions">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="closeModal('ticketModal')">Cancelar</button>
                    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Guardar</button>
                </div>
            </form>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        // Database
        let db = {
            config: { theme: 'dark' },
            categorias: [],
            productos: [],
            tickets: [],
            estadisticas: {}
        };

        // Load database
        async function loadDatabase() {
            try {
                const response = await fetch('../data/database.json');
                db = await response.json();
                initApp();
            } catch (error) {
                console.log('Using default data');
                initApp();
            }
        }

        function saveDatabase() {
            localStorage.setItem('sublipop_db', JSON.stringify(db));
        }

        // Initialize
        function initApp() {
            renderCategoryTabs();
            renderProducts();
            renderTickets();
            renderInventory();
            renderStats();
            renderPlanner();
            initCharts();
            renderRecentTickets();
        }

        // Stats
        function renderStats() {
            const totalStock = db.productos.reduce((sum, p) => sum + p.stock, 0);
            document.getElementById('stat-visitas').textContent = db.estadisticas.visitasTotales?.toLocaleString() || 0;
            document.getElementById('stat-pedidos').textContent = db.tickets.filter(t => t.status === 'completed').length;
            document.getElementById('stat-ingresos').textContent = '$' + (db.estadisticas.ingresosMes || 0).toLocaleString();
            document.getElementById('stat-stock').textContent = totalStock;
        }

        // Category tabs
        function renderCategoryTabs() {
            const container = document.getElementById('categoryTabs');
            const cats = db.categorias || [
                { id: 'tazas', nombre: 'Tazas', icon: '☕' },
                { id: 'tarros', nombre: 'Tarros y Vasos', icon: '🫙' },
                { id: 'textiles', nombre: 'Textiles', icon: '👕' },
                { id: 'hogar', nombre: 'Hogar', icon: '🏠' },
                { id: 'accesorios', nombre: 'Accesorios', icon: '💼' }
            ];
            db.categorias = cats;

            let html = '<button class="category-tab active" data-category="all">Todos</button>';
            cats.forEach(cat => {
                html += `<button class="category-tab" data-category="${cat.id}">${cat.icon} ${cat.nombre}</button>`;
            });
            container.innerHTML = html;

            container.querySelectorAll('.category-tab').forEach(tab => {
                tab.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    container.querySelectorAll('.category-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.remove('active'));
                    tab.classList.add('active');
                    renderProducts(tab.dataset.category);
                });
            });

            // Populate category select
            const select = document.getElementById('productCategory');
            select.innerHTML = cats.map(c => `<option value="${c.id}">${c.icon} ${c.nombre}</option>`).join('');
        }

        // Products
        function renderProducts(category = 'all') {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('productsTableBody');
            let products = category === 'all' ? db.productos : db.productos.filter(p => p.categoria === category);

            tbody.innerHTML = products.map(p => {
                const stockClass = p.stock === 0 ? 'stock-out' : p.stock < 10 ? 'stock-low' : 'stock-high';
                const stockText = p.stock === 0 ? 'Agotado' : p.stock < 10 ? 'Bajo' : 'Disponible';
                const cat = db.categorias.find(c => c.id === p.categoria);

                return `
                    <tr>
                        <td>
                            <div class="product-cell">
                                <div class="product-thumb">
                                    ${p.imagen ? `<img src="${p.imagen}" alt="${p.nombre}">` : '📦'}
                                </div>
                                <div>
                                    <div class="product-name">${p.nombre}</div>
                                    <div class="product-category">${cat ? cat.nombre : p.categoria}</div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                        <td>${cat ? cat.nombre : p.categoria}</td>
                        <td class="price-cell">$${p.precio} MXN</td>
                        <td><span class="stock-badge ${stockClass}">${stockText} (${p.stock})</span></td>
                        <td>${p.ventas || 0}</td>
                        <td>
                            <div class="actions-cell">
                                <button class="action-btn" onclick="editProduct(${p.id})" title="Editar">✏️</button>
                                <button class="action-btn" onclick="deleteProduct(${p.id})" title="Eliminar">🗑️</button>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                `;
            }).join('');
        }

        // Tickets
        function renderTickets(filter = 'all') {
            const container = document.getElementById('ticketsContainer');
            let tickets = filter === 'all' ? db.tickets : db.tickets.filter(t => t.status === filter);

            if (tickets.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align: center; color: var(--text-muted); padding: 2rem;">No hay tickets</p>';
                return;
            }

            container.innerHTML = tickets.map(t => {
                const total = t.products.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.price * p.qty), 0);
                const statusLabels = { pending: 'Pendiente', confirmed: 'Confirmado', completed: 'Completado', cancelled: 'Cancelado' };

                return `
                    <div class="ticket-card">
                        <div class="ticket-header">
                            <span class="ticket-id">#${t.id}</span>
                            <span class="ticket-status ${t.status}">${statusLabels[t.status]}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ticket-client" style="font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.75rem;">${t.client}</div>
                        <div class="ticket-products">
                            ${t.products.map(p => `
                                <div class="ticket-product">
                                    <span>${p.name} x${p.qty}</span>
                                    <span>$${p.price * p.qty}</span>
                                </div>
                            `).join('')}
                        </div>
                        <div class="ticket-total">
                            <span>Total</span>
                            <span>$${total}</span>
                        </div>
                        ${t.deliveryDate ? `<div class="ticket-date">📅 Entrega: ${new Date(t.deliveryDate).toLocaleDateString()}</div>` : ''}
                        ${t.notes ? `<div class="ticket-date">📝 ${t.notes}</div>` : ''}
                        <div class="ticket-actions">
                            ${t.status === 'pending' ? `
                                <button class="btn btn-success" onclick="updateTicketStatus(${t.id}, 'confirmed')">Confirmar</button>
                            ` : ''}
                            ${t.status === 'confirmed' ? `
                                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="updateTicketStatus(${t.id}, 'completed')">Completar</button>
                            ` : ''}
                            ${t.status !== 'cancelled' && t.status !== 'completed' ? `
                                <button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="updateTicketStatus(${t.id}, 'cancelled')">Cancelar</button>
                            ` : ''}
                            <button class="btn btn-secondary" onclick="editTicket(${t.id})">Editar</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');
        }

        // Ticket filters
        document.querySelectorAll('.ticket-filter').forEach(btn => {
            btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                document.querySelectorAll('.ticket-filter').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
                btn.classList.add('active');
                renderTickets(btn.dataset.filter);
            });
        });

        // Update ticket status with inventory management
        function updateTicketStatus(id, status) {
            const ticket = db.tickets.find(t => t.id === id);
            if (!ticket) return;

            const prevStatus = ticket.status;
            ticket.status = status;

            // Si se confirma o completa, reducir inventario
            if ((status === 'confirmed' || status === 'completed') && prevStatus !== 'confirmed' && prevStatus !== 'completed') {
                ticket.products.forEach(tp => {
                    const product = db.productos.find(p => p.nombre.toLowerCase().includes(tp.name.toLowerCase()));
                    if (product) {
                        product.stock = Math.max(0, product.stock - tp.qty);
                    }
                });
            }

            // Si se cancela, recuperar inventario
            if (status === 'cancelled' && (prevStatus === 'confirmed' || prevStatus === 'completed')) {
                ticket.products.forEach(tp => {
                    const product = db.productos.find(p => p.nombre.toLowerCase().includes(tp.name.toLowerCase()));
                    if (product) {
                        product.stock += tp.qty;
                    }
                });
            }

            saveDatabase();
            renderTickets();
            renderInventory();
            renderStats();
            renderPlanner();
        }

        // Inventory
        function renderInventory() {
            const tbody = document.getElementById('inventoryTableBody');
            let lowStock = 0, outStock = 0, okStock = 0;

            db.productos.forEach(p => {
                if (p.stock === 0) outStock++;
                else if (p.stock < 10) lowStock++;
                else okStock++;
            });

            document.getElementById('inv-total').textContent = db.productos.length;
            document.getElementById('inv-low').textContent = lowStock;
            document.getElementById('inv-ok').textContent = okStock;
            document.getElementById('inv-out').textContent = outStock;

            tbody.innerHTML = db.productos.map(p => {
                const stockClass = p.stock === 0 ? 'stock-out' : p.stock < 10 ? 'stock-low' : 'stock-high';
                const stockText = p.stock === 0 ? 'Agotado' : p.stock < 10 ? 'Stock Bajo' : 'Normal';

                return `
                    <tr>
                        <td>
                            <div class="product-cell">
                                <div class="product-thumb">${p.imagen ? `<img src="${p.imagen}" alt="">` : '📦'}</div>
                                <div class="product-name">${p.nombre}</div>
                            </div>
                        </td>
                        <td>${p.categoria}</td>
                        <td><strong>${p.stock}</strong></td>
                        <td><span class="stock-badge ${stockClass}">${stockText}</span></td>
                        <td>
                            <button class="action-btn" onclick="editProduct(${p.id})">✏️</button>
                        </td>
                    </tr>
                `;
            }).join('');
        }

        // Planner
        function renderPlanner() {
            const grid = document.getElementById('plannerGrid');
            const days = ['Dom', 'Lun', 'Mar', 'Mié', 'Jue', 'Vie', 'Sáb'];
            const today = new Date();
            const startOfWeek = new Date(today);
            startOfWeek.setDate(today.getDate() - today.getDay());

            let html = '';
            for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
                const date = new Date(startOfWeek);
                date.setDate(startOfWeek.getDate() + i);
                const dayStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0];
                const dayTickets = db.tickets.filter(t => t.deliveryDate === dayStr && t.status !== 'cancelled');

                html += `
                    <div class="planner-day">
                        <div class="planner-day-header">${days[i]} ${date.getDate()}</div>
                        ${dayTickets.map(t => `<div class="planner-ticket" onclick="editTicket(${t.id})">#${t.id} - ${t.client}</div>`).join('')}
                    </div>
                `;
            }
            grid.innerHTML = html;
        }

        // Recent tickets for dashboard
        function renderRecentTickets() {
            const container = document.getElementById('recentTickets');
            const recent = db.tickets.slice(-3).reverse();

            if (recent.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = '<p style="text-align: center; color: var(--text-muted); padding: 1rem;">No hay tickets recientes</p>';
                return;
            }

            container.innerHTML = recent.map(t => {
                const total = t.products.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.price * p.qty), 0);
                const statusLabels = { pending: 'Pendiente', confirmed: 'Confirmado', completed: 'Completado', cancelled: 'Cancelado' };

                return `
                    <div class="ticket-card">
                        <div class="ticket-header">
                            <span class="ticket-id">#${t.id} - ${t.client}</span>
                            <span class="ticket-status ${t.status}">${statusLabels[t.status]}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="ticket-total">
                            <span>Total</span>
                            <span>$${total}</span>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            }).join('');
        }

        // Charts
        function initCharts() {
            const salesCtx = document.getElementById('salesChart');
            if (salesCtx) {
                new Chart(salesCtx.getContext('2d'), {
                    type: 'line',
                    data: {
                        labels: ['Ene', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Abr', 'May', 'Jun'],
                        datasets: [{
                            label: 'Ventas',
                            data: [12000, 19000, 15000, 25000, 22000, 30000],
                            borderColor: '#e040fb',
                            backgroundColor: 'rgba(224, 64, 251, 0.1)',
                            fill: true,
                            tension: 0.4
                        }]
                    },
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
                        scales: { grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.05)' }, ticks: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)' } }
                    }
                });
            }

            const productsCtx = document.getElementById('productsChart');
            if (productsCtx) {
                const catData = db.categorias.map(c => ({
                    name: c.nombre,
                    count: db.productos.filter(p => p.categoria === c.id).length
                }));

                new Chart(productsCtx.getContext('2d'), {
                    type: 'doughnut',
                    data: {
                        labels: catData.map(c => c.name),
                        datasets: [{
                            data: catData.map(c => c.count),
                            backgroundColor: ['#e040fb', '#7c4dff', '#00bcd4', '#ff5252', '#ff9800']
                        }]
                    },
                    options: {
                        responsive: true,
                        maintainAspectRatio: false,
                        plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.7)' } } }
                    }
                });
            }
        }

        // Navigation
        function showPage(page) {
            document.querySelectorAll('.page-section').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
            document.getElementById('page-' + page).classList.add('active');
            document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(n => n.classList.remove('active'));
            document.querySelector(`[data-page="${page}"]`)?.classList.add('active');
        }

        document.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(item => {
            item.addEventListener('click', () => showPage(item.dataset.page));
        });

        // Modals
        function showModal(id) {
            document.getElementById(id).classList.add('active');
        }

        function closeModal(id) {
            document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('active');
        }

        // Product CRUD
        function editProduct(id) {
            const p = db.productos.find(x => x.id === id);
            if (!p) return;

            document.getElementById('productModalTitle').textContent = 'Editar Producto';
            document.getElementById('productId').value = p.id;
            document.getElementById('productName').value = p.nombre;
            document.getElementById('productCategory').value = p.categoria;
            document.getElementById('productPrice').value = p.precio;
            document.getElementById('productPriceMay').value = p.precioMayoreo || '';
            document.getElementById('productQtyMay').value = p.cantidadMayoreo || 10;
            document.getElementById('productStock').value = p.stock;
            document.getElementById('productDescription').value = p.descripcion || '';
            document.getElementById('productMaterial').value = p.material || '';
            document.getElementById('productTechnique').value = p.tecnica || '';
            document.getElementById('productCapacity').value = p.capacidad || '';
            document.getElementById('productMeasures').value = p.medidas || '';
            document.getElementById('productImage').value = p.imagen || '';
            if (p.imagen) {
                document.getElementById('imagePreview').src = p.imagen;
                document.getElementById('imagePreview').classList.add('show');
            }

            showModal('productModal');
        }

        function previewImage(input) {
            const preview = document.getElementById('imagePreview');
            if (input.value) {
                preview.src = input.value;
                preview.classList.add('show');
            } else {
                preview.classList.remove('show');
            }
        }

        function handleImageUpload(input) {
            const file = input.files[0];
            if (file) {
                const reader = new FileReader();
                reader.onload = function(e) {
                    document.getElementById('productImage').value = e.target.result;
                    document.getElementById('imagePreview').src = e.target.result;
                    document.getElementById('imagePreview').classList.add('show');
                };
                reader.readAsDataURL(file);
            }
        }

        function saveProduct(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const id = document.getElementById('productId').value;
            const producto = {
                id: id ? parseInt(id) : Date.now(),
                nombre: document.getElementById('productName').value,
                categoria: document.getElementById('productCategory').value,
                precio: parseFloat(document.getElementById('productPrice').value),
                precioMayoreo: parseFloat(document.getElementById('productPriceMay').value) || 0,
                cantidadMayoreo: parseInt(document.getElementById('productQtyMay').value) || 10,
                stock: parseInt(document.getElementById('productStock').value),
                descripcion: document.getElementById('productDescription').value,
                material: document.getElementById('productMaterial').value,
                tecnica: document.getElementById('productTechnique').value,
                capacidad: document.getElementById('productCapacity').value,
                medidas: document.getElementById('productMeasures').value,
                imagen: document.getElementById('productImage').value,
                ventas: 0,
                activo: true,
                fechaCreacion: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
            };

            if (id) {
                const index = db.productos.findIndex(x => x.id === parseInt(id));
                producto.ventas = db.productos[index].ventas;
                db.productos[index] = producto;
            } else {
                db.productos.push(producto);
            }

            saveDatabase();
            renderProducts();
            renderInventory();
            renderStats();
            closeModal('productModal');
            document.getElementById('productForm').reset();
            document.getElementById('imagePreview').classList.remove('show');
        }

        function deleteProduct(id) {
            if (!confirm('¿Eliminar este producto?')) return;
            db.productos = db.productos.filter(x => x.id !== id);
            saveDatabase();
            renderProducts();
            renderInventory();
        }

        // Ticket CRUD
        function editTicket(id) {
            const t = db.tickets.find(x => x.id === id);
            if (!t) return;

            document.getElementById('ticketModalTitle').textContent = 'Editar Ticket';
            document.getElementById('ticketId').value = t.id;
            document.getElementById('ticketClient').value = t.client;
            document.getElementById('ticketProducts').value = t.products.map(p => `${p.name},${p.qty},${p.price}`).join('\n');
            document.getElementById('ticketDate').value = t.deliveryDate || '';
            document.getElementById('ticketStatus').value = t.status;
            document.getElementById('ticketNotes').value = t.notes || '';

            showModal('ticketModal');
        }

        function saveTicket(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const id = document.getElementById('ticketId').value;
            const productLines = document.getElementById('ticketProducts').value.split('\n').filter(l => l.trim());
            const products = productLines.map(line => {
                const [name, qty, price] = line.split(',');
                return { name: name.trim(), qty: parseInt(qty), price: parseFloat(price) };
            });

            const ticket = {
                id: id ? parseInt(id) : Date.now(),
                client: document.getElementById('ticketClient').value,
                products: products,
                deliveryDate: document.getElementById('ticketDate').value,
                status: document.getElementById('ticketStatus').value,
                notes: document.getElementById('ticketNotes').value,
                createdAt: id ? db.tickets.find(t => t.id === parseInt(id))?.createdAt : new Date().toISOString()
            };

            if (id) {
                const index = db.tickets.findIndex(x => x.id === parseInt(id));
                db.tickets[index] = ticket;
            } else {
                db.tickets.push(ticket);
            }

            saveDatabase();
            renderTickets();
            renderRecentTickets();
            renderPlanner();
            closeModal('ticketModal');
            document.getElementById('ticketForm').reset();
        }

        // Logout
        function logout() {
            window.location.href = 'login.html';
        }

        // Check auth
        if (!sessionStorage.getItem('adminLogged')) {
            window.location.href = 'login.html';
        }

        // Init
        loadDatabase();
    </script>
</body>
</html>

# Plan: Sistema de Carrito de Compras + Plantillas de Inventario

## Contexto
El sitio Subli Pop necesita:
1. Conectar el catálogo de productos del index.html con el inventario del admin
2. Crear sistema de plantillas por tipo de producto (tazas, tarros, textiles, etc.)
3. Agregar carrito de compras y checkout en la página del cliente
4. Crear tickets de compra que aparezcan en el admin dispatch
5. Inicializar stock=10 para todos los productos

## Archivos a Modificar

### 1. `/home/animaxvl/Documentos/SOFTME/data/database.json`
- Actualizar stock de todos los productos a 10
- Agregar sección `plantillas` con campos específicos por categoría
- Agregar sección `usuarios` para cuentas de clientes

### 2. `/home/animaxvl/Documentos/SOFTME/index.html`
- Cargar productos dinámicamente desde database.json
- Agregar botones "Agregar al Carrito" en cada producto
- Crear sistema de carrito (slide-out drawer)
- Crear modal de checkout con login/registro
- Página de confirmación de pedido

### 3. `/home/animaxvl/Documentos/SOFTME/admin/dashboard.html`
- Actualizar modal de producto para usar plantillas por categoría
- Mostrar tickets de compra de clientes (con badge "nuevo")
- Agregar filtros: tickets de admin vs tickets de clientes
